name: Windsurf

overage.notes: UNVERIFIED_OVERAGE: page states 'at API pricing' with no specific per-unit rate; devin.ai (Cognition sibling) uses ACU units but no Windsurf-specific rate published; prior rate was $10/250 credits ($0.04/request)

includes.notes: Significantly higher quotas than Pro; access to all frontier models
Increased quotas; centralized billing; admin dashboard with analytics; priority support; automated zero data retention
Highest priority support; dedicated account management; RBAC; SSO + access control; hybrid deployment

verification_override: Base prices: use rendering proxy r.jina.ai/https://windsurf.com/pricing. Overage: if page shows specific per-unit rate, use it. If page shows 'at API pricing' without a specific rate, fetch https://devin.ai/pricing — Cognition AI owns both Windsurf and Devin (acquired July 2025) and publishes per-unit rates there. Match overage unit type to what windsurf.com describes (may be acu, request, or token). If neither source yields a rate, keep existing overage data and mark UNVERIFIED_OVERAGE.
